entry.title: Drone strike hits Volgograd refinery, 200kbpd offline
entry.summary: Ukrainian drones struck the Volgograd refinery overnight. Russian energy ministry confirms 200 thousand barrels per day of capacity offline; repair timeline uncertain.

entry.title: Trump sets 8 PM deadline for Iran nuclear deal
entry.summary: President Trump issued an 8 PM Eastern deadline for Iran to accept the nuclear framework or face immediate consequences.
